summary: Completed comprehensive testing of all 10 features. Backend API tests: 12/12 passed. Frontend UI tests: All 10 features verified and working correctly.
passed_tests: Feature 1: Dashboard - List inspections with filters (Todas, Em Andamento, C/ Ressalvas, Aprovadas, Reprovadas) - All tabs working
Feature 2: Nova Vistoria - Create new inspection with required fields (cliente, data, endereço, unidade) - Form submission navigates to checklist
Feature 3: Editar Informações - Route /inspection/:id/edit working, pre-populates existing data, allows editing
Feature 4: Checklist - Navigate between rooms (Sala, Cozinha, Banheiro, Varanda, Quarto), fill items with Existência/Condição, validation working
Feature 5: Adicionar Cômodos - Button to add extra rooms (modal with Quarto, Banheiro, etc.) - Added Quarto 2 successfully
Feature 6: Upload de Fotos - 'Escolher Arquivo' and 'Tirar Foto' buttons present, mobile warning shown on desktop for 'Tirar Foto'
Feature 7: Finalização - Classification (Aprovado, Aprovado com Ressalvas, Reprovado), conclusion, signature pad, responsible, CREA, date - All fields present
Feature 8: PDF - 'Baixar PDF' button opens preview modal with iframe showing generated PDF, 'Baixar PDF' and 'Compartilhar' buttons present
Feature 9: Compartilhar - Modal with WhatsApp and E-mail options working correctly
Feature 10: Modal de Confirmação - Navigation modal appears when clicking home/back button, showing 'Cancelar' and 'Sim' options
seed_data_creation: Created test inspection via API for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 features from the requirements are working correctly. Backend API endpoints for CRUD operations, identification updates, and photo uploads are functional. Frontend includes proper data-testid attributes for automated testing. PDF generation uses jspdf and jspdf-autotable on the client side. No mocked APIs - all integrations are real.

checklist.room_tabs: Sala, Cozinha, Banheiro, Área Externa (Varanda), Quarto - all working
checklist.add_room: Working - modal with all room types
checklist.mobile_warning: Shown correctly when clicking 'Tirar Foto' on desktop

review_finalization.classification_buttons: Aprovado, Aprovado com Ressalvas, Reprovado - all working

pdf_share.pdf_preview: Modal with iframe showing generated PDF
